exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT "Index" AS idx, COUNT(*) AS n_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" < '2019-01-01'
GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql:
SELECT "Index" AS idx, COUNT(*) AS n_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" < '2019-01-01'
GROUP BY "Index";

args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_ZWq5ReTlHtbADjX3TD2XwBIa)
# cast numeric cols
for c in ['n_days','up_days','down_days']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# infer North American indices among available tickers
north_america = {'IXIC', 'NYA', 'GSPTSE'}  # Nasdaq Composite, NYSE Composite, S&P/TSX Composite
na = df[df['idx'].isin(north_america)].copy()
na['more_up_than_down'] = na['up_days'] > na['down_days']
res = na[na['more_up_than_down']].sort_values('idx')[['idx','up_days','down_days','n_days']]

# map to names
name_map = {
    'IXIC': 'NASDAQ Composite (IXIC)',
    'NYA': 'NYSE Composite (NYA)',
    'GSPTSE': 'S&P/TSX Composite (GSPTSE)'
}
res['index_name'] = res['idx'].map(name_map).fillna(res['idx'])

out = res[['index_name','up_days','down_days','n_days']].to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

import json
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_ZWq5ReTlHtbADjX3TD2XwBIa)
# cast numeric cols
for c in ['n_days','up_days','down_days']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# infer North American indices among available tickers
north_america = {'IXIC', 'NYA', 'GSPTSE'}  # Nasdaq Composite, NYSE Composite, S&P/TSX Composite
na = df[df['idx'].isin(north_america)].copy()
na['more_up_than_down'] = na['up_days'] > na['down_days']
res = na[na['more_up_than_down']].sort_values('idx')[['idx','up_days','down_days','n_days']]

# map to names
name_map = {
    'IXIC': 'NASDAQ Composite (IXIC)',
    'NYA': 'NYSE Composite (NYA)',
    'GSPTSE': 'S&P/TSX Composite (GSPTSE)'
}
res['index_name'] = res['idx'].map(name_map).fillna(res['idx'])

out = res[['index_name','up_days','down_days','n_days']].to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

result.preview: "S&P/TSX Composite (GSPTSE) and NASDAQ Composite (IXIC) had more up days than down days in 2018 (up vs down: 44 vs 41; 44 vs 31, respectively)."

args.answer: S&P/TSX Composite (GSPTSE) and NASDAQ Composite (IXIC) had more up days than down days in 2018 (up vs down: 44 vs 41; 44 vs 31, respectively).
